Table 13 | Comparison between theoretical speedups derived from the FLOP analysis and measured empirical speedups on Qwen3-30B-A3B across different sequence lengths.

Figure 4 | Visualization of per-token 𝑟𝑍𝐸 for decoded text, showing one sampled response from AIME24 (left), LiveCodeBench v5 (middle), and IFBench (right), respectively. Due to space constraints, only the first and last 80 tokens of each response are retained.

Figure 5 | Visualization of 𝑟𝑍𝐸 across layers and response positions, using the same data in Figure 4. Token-level 𝑟𝑍𝐸 values are averaged over chunks of size 1000 (for AIME24 and LiveCodeBench v5) and 100 (for IFBench), respectively. The last chunk is averaged over its actual token number.
